title: ETFs or Mutual Funds? How to Target Benefits of Both Worlds. | Dimensional
author: Featuring Jake DeKinder, Head of Client Communications
text:
Perspectives ETFs or Mutual Funds? How to Target Benefits of Both Worlds. Featuring Jake DeKinder, Head of Client Communications   |   Isabelle Williams, Deputy Head of Investment Solutions   |   David Kavanaugh, Global Head of Investment Operations ETFs or Mutual Funds? How to Target Benefits of Both Worlds. View All Insights

Jun 18, 2026 Topic Equity Investing ETFs Retirement

In Episode 50 of The Informed Investor podcast: Is investing in exchange-traded funds or mutual funds an either/or choice? Not anymore. KEY TAKEAWAYS ETF share classes provide an additional access point in mutual fund strategies. Multi-class funds with ETF share classes offer many potential benefits for investors.  VIEW ALL EPISODES ON YOUTUBE
Also available on Spotify and Apple Podcasts.
